**Preparing to update color variables**I’ll add a full color token set in `global.css` under `:root`, matching the hex values from your image (primary + gray scale), so you can reuse them across the project.Added the color variables from your image in `undefined`.

- Primary: `--red`, `--purple`, `--blue`, `--green`, `--yellow`
- Base: `--gray-100` to `--gray-600`

If you want, I can now replace hardcoded colors in your other CSS files to use these variables automatically.
